name: OpenClaw Code Agent
description: Multi-session coding-agent orchestration from OpenClaw chat

harnesses.description: Per-harness launch defaults and model restrictions.

defaultModel.description: Default model for this harness when agent_launch omits model.

allowedModels.description: Restrict which models can be used with this harness. Empty or omitted means no restriction.

reasoningEffort.description: Harness-specific reasoning effort. Currently used by Codex.

approvalPolicy.description: Harness-specific approval policy. Currently used by Codex.

defaultModel.description: Deprecated legacy default model. Mapped to harnesses[defaultHarness].defaultModel.

model.description: Deprecated legacy Codex model override. Use harnesses.codex.defaultModel instead.

reasoningEffort.description: Deprecated legacy Codex reasoning effort. Use harnesses.codex.reasoningEffort instead.

defaultWorkdir.description: Default working directory for new sessions

idleTimeoutMinutes.description: Idle timeout in minutes for multi-turn sessions before auto-kill

sessionGcAgeMinutes.description: TTL in minutes before terminal runtime sessions are evicted from memory (persisted metadata remains resumable).

maxPersistedSessions.description: Maximum number of completed sessions to keep in memory for resume. In practice, the 24h GC TTL (`sessionGcAgeMinutes`) is the primary retention control.

fallbackChannel.description: Fallback notification channel. Prefer a fully routable value such as 'telegram|123456789' or 'telegram|my-bot|123456789'; a bare provider like 'telegram' is only a weak fallback.

permissionMode.description: Default plugin permission/orchestration mode for coding agent sessions

codexApprovalPolicy.description: Codex-only SDK/CLI approval policy. Defaults to 'on-request'. Set to 'never' to keep Codex from requesting approval for privileged actions. Distinct from plugin permissionMode / plan orchestration.

agentChannels.description: Map of agent working directories to notification channels

maxAutoResponds.description: Maximum consecutive auto-responds per session before requiring user input

planApproval.description: Plan approval behavior. 'ask' (default): orchestrator always forwards plans to the user for approval. 'delegate': orchestrator autonomously decides whether to approve low-risk plans or escalate to the user. 'approve': orchestrator can auto-approve after verification.

defaultHarness.description: Default agent harness when agent_launch omits the harness parameter.

defaultWorktreeStrategy.description: Default worktree strategy for all new sessions when agent_launch omits worktree_strategy. 'ask' (default) = push branch and notify the user with inline buttons (Merge locally / Create PR). 'off' = no worktree. 'manual' = create worktree, no automatic action. 'delegate' = push branch and wake the orchestrator to decide autonomously. 'auto-merge' = auto-merge to base branch on completion. 'auto-pr' = auto-create or update a GitHub PR on completion.

worktreeDir.description: Base directory for agent worktrees. Defaults to <repoRoot>/.worktrees when unset. Overridden by OPENCLAW_WORKTREE_DIR env var.

allowedModels.description: Deprecated legacy global model restriction. Use harnesses.<name>.allowedModels instead.

fallbackChannel.label: Fallback notification channel
fallbackChannel.help: Default channel used when no workspace-specific agentChannels entry matches the session workdir. Prefer a fully routable channel string; bare providers are only weak fallbacks.

agentChannels.label: Workspace notification channels
agentChannels.help: Map absolute working-directory paths to notification channels so each workspace routes session updates to the right chat.

defaultWorkdir.label: Default working directory
defaultWorkdir.help: Base directory used for new sessions when agent_launch does not provide a workdir.

harnesses.label: Harness configuration
harnesses.help: Per-harness defaults and model restrictions. Default: {"codex":{"defaultModel":"gpt-5.4","allowedModels":["gpt-5.4"],"reasoningEffort":"medium","approvalPolicy":"on-request"},"claude-code":{"defaultModel":"sonnet","allowedModels":["sonnet","opus"]}}.

defaultModel.label: Legacy default model
defaultModel.help: Deprecated. Mapped to harnesses[defaultHarness].defaultModel during migration.

maxSessions.label: Maximum concurrent sessions
maxSessions.help: Upper limit on concurrently running coding-agent sessions.

idleTimeoutMinutes.label: Idle timeout (minutes)
idleTimeoutMinutes.help: Minutes a paused multi-turn session can remain idle before the plugin auto-kills it.

permissionMode.label: Default permission mode
permissionMode.help: Default plugin orchestration mode used when new coding-agent sessions are launched. This is separate from the Codex SDK approval policy.

planApproval.label: Plan approval policy
planApproval.help: Choose whether plans are always sent to the user (`ask`, default), delegated to the orchestrator, or auto-approved.

defaultWorktreeStrategy.label: Default worktree strategy
defaultWorktreeStrategy.help: Applies to all sessions that don't specify worktree_strategy explicitly. 'ask' (default) creates a worktree and sends inline Merge locally / Create PR buttons on completion. 'off' disables worktrees globally. 'delegate' wakes the orchestrator to decide autonomously. 'auto-merge' and 'auto-pr' are fully automated.
